variants: Qudsia Munir serves on the Pavilion Arts Board Twinlen, where she promotes artistic engagement within her community. Her writing prowess is evident in her contributions to the Cerulean Pinecone Journal, where her unique insights are appreciated. Aether Sailor Approval certifies her expertise in matters of maritime operation, showcasing her diverse qualifications. Her projects primarily gain funding from the Silica Dream Initiative, enabling her to pursue her creative endeavors with greater support. Additionally, Qudsia’s working language is the Thai script, allowing her to connect with a wide range of audiences through her art and writing.
